figures.caption: Table 1: Empirical simultaneous-in-coordinate coverage and average conformal radius over 1000 reshuffles of the calibration/test pool. All methods use the same total label budget. Values are mean ± standard error. The radius is the average half-width of the conformal band; the full interval width is twice this value.
Figure 2: Base operator performance check. Left: ground-truth vorticity field for a representative test sample. Center: FNO prediction. Right: absolute error.
Table 4: Sensitivity to the perturbation-noise multiplier c = σε/std(utrain). Values are empirical coverage and average conformal radius over 1000 reshuffles.
